SAME ARCHITECTURE, FIVE EXPRESSIONS:

Mathematical Layer:
вҖў s вҠҘ m | X (conditional independence)
вҖў R < 1 (reconstruction ceiling)
вҖў I(X; s,m) вүӨ I(X;s) + I(X;m) (additive bounds)
вҖў Fano's inequality applications

Narrative Layer:
вҖў Soulbis & Soulbae (dual agents as characters)
вҖў The Gap (privacy preserved between agents)
вҖў Mirror & Map (observation vs action)
вҖў Acts & Arcs (learning through story)

Economic Layer:
вҖў SWORD & MAGE (dual tokens for protection/delegation)
вҖў Signals (0.01 ZEC, proof of learning)
вҖў Guardians (infrastructure providers)
вҖў VRCs (bilateral trust credentials)

вҖў IEEE 7012-2025 (machine-readable privacy terms)
вҖў Customer Commons (neutral agreement hosting)
вҖў SD-BASE taxonomy (agreement hierarchy)
вҖў Bilateral contracts (signed by both parties)

Promise Layer (NEW):
вҖў Autonomy axiom (agents promise only own behavior)
вҖў Superagent structure (FP+S+M as composite)
вҖў Trust function (0-1 expectation of promise-keeping)
вҖў Assessment (signals as assessment events)

### Cross-Layer Translation Table

| Concept | Mathematical | Narrative | Economic | Promise |
|---------|-------------|-----------|----------|---------|
| **Dual Agents** | s вҠҘ m \| X | Soulbis & Soulbae | SWORD & MAGE | Scope separation |
| **Separation** | Conditional independence | The Gap | Information firewall | Kept promise |
| **Privacy Bound** | R < 1 (reconstruction ceiling) | "They cannot see your whole" | Surveillance resistance | Irreducible promise |
| **Learning** | Compression protocol | Reading Acts, deriving proverbs | Posting signals (0.01 ZEC) | Assessment events |
| **Trust** | Bilateral knowledge | Shared stories | VRCs (relationship credentials) | Trust function П„(0-1) |
| **Infrastructure** | System observers | Guardians of the realm | SWORD token holders | Promise-keepers |
| **Coordination** | Mutual information | Spells | VRC efficiency | Coordination promises |
| **Budget** | C_S + C_M < H(X) | Capacity limits | Token allocation | Valency constraint |

WHAT AGENTS CANNOT PROMISE:

### Promise Types in 0xagentprivacy

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ              PROMISE TYPE CLASSIFICATION                     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

TYPE 1: Give Promises (+)
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ "I will provide X to you"              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Examples:                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Swordsman (+) protection вҶ’ FP        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Mage (+) delegation вҶ’ FP             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Guardian (+) validation вҶ’ network    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў First Person (+) authorization вҶ’ S,M в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

TYPE 2: Accept Promises (-)
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ "I will accept/use what you provide"   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Examples:                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Swordsman (-) accepts authorization  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Mage (-) accepts authorized info     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Network (-) accepts chronicles       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў VRC partner (-) accepts verification в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

TYPE 3: Coordination Promises C(b)
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ "I will voluntarily subordinate my     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  behavior to external authority b"     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Examples:                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Spell = C(protocol_rules)            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў VRC = C(bilateral_agreement)         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Guardian = C(compression_standards)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ NOTE: Subordination is VOLUNTARY       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       Agent can always revoke          в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

TYPE 4: The Irreducible Promise
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ "A property that exists only in the    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  relationship between agents"          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ The Gap (вҠҘ) is irreducible:           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Cannot be attributed to Swordsman    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Cannot be attributed to Mage         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Exists in their maintained separationв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Requires all three (FP+S+M) to exist в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ R_max < 1 IS the irreducible promise   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Betweenness Centrality (V5.4):         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Gap has maximal C_B(v) in trust graphв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Value lives where most paths cross   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Brandes (2001): O(VВ·E) algorithm     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

WHY SUPERAGENT MATTERS:

1. ADVERSARY SEES EXTERIOR ONLY
   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
   в”Ӯ Adversary observes superagent       в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ Cannot see interior promises        в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ Cannot distinguish S from M         в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ Cannot observe Gap directly         в”Ӯ
   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

2. COMPROMISE REQUIRES ALL THREE
   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
   в”Ӯ Compromise S alone вҶ’ Learn C_S bits в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ Compromise M alone вҶ’ Learn C_M bits в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ Compromise FP alone вҶ’ No agent keys в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ                                     в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ Full reconstruction requires ALL:   в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ FP + S + M cooperating              в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ                                     в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ The Gap exists in their cooperation в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ No single compromise captures it    в”Ӯ
   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

3. IRREDUCIBLE PROMISE LOCATION
   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
   в”Ӯ R_max < 1 is not in S               в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ R_max < 1 is not in M               в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ R_max < 1 is not in FP              в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ                                     в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ R_max < 1 is IN THE RELATIONSHIP    в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ It exists BETWEEN the components    в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ It requires maintained separation   в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ                                     в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ This is the "shimmer of dignity"    в”Ӯ
   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

### Layer Descriptions (Promise-Theoretic)

**Sovereign Agent (Top Layers):**
- **UI & Human Experience**: User-facing interfaces for making and accepting promises
- **Trust Tasks**: Core functionality for promise exchange, coordination, and verification

**Trust Spanning Protocol (TSP):**
- Connects agent layer (promise-making) with wallet layer (commitment storage)
- Implements coordination promises C(b) across the stack

**Sovereign Wallet (Bottom Layers):**
- **Verifiable Credentials & Digital Assets**: Storage for promise bundles and commitment stakes
- **Self-Certifying Identifiers (SCIDs)**: Foundation for autonomy axiom compliance
- **Cryptographic Keys**: Enforcement layer for promise-keeping (ZK proofs transform "trust me" to "verify me")

### Selection Matrix

| Use Case | Recommended Model | Why (PT Rationale) |
|----------|------------------|-----|
| **Consumer privacy app** | Merit + Time (SWORD) | Learning proves assessment capability |
| **Enterprise deployment** | SLA Contracts | Legal promises, clear enforcement |
| **Research network** | Peer Reputation | Trust function through academic merit |
| **DeFi protocol** | Economic Staking | Capital commitment, incentive compatibility |
| **Activist network** | Trust Consensus | Mission alignment as coordination promise |

в”Ӯ                                                  в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ вҖў Unique to their relationship                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Meaningless to outsiders                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Verifiable by each other                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Recoverable if one forgets                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                  в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ     Matching compression = mutual assessment    в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ IF: Alice loses her keys                         в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ       using their bilateral proverb              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ How it works:                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 1. Alice claims: "I'm Alice, I lost my keys"    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 2. Bob asks: "What's our proverb?"              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 3. Alice forms correct proverb from context     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 4. Bob verifies: "Yes, that's Alice"            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 5. Recovery proceeds (with multiple VRCs)       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ PT: Recovery through demonstrated promise-       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     keeping (expanding the cipher correctly)     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ No biometrics. No personal questions.           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Just bilateral promise verification.            в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

### VRC Properties (Promise Bundle Characteristics)

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ                 VRC PROPERTIES                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ              (Promise Bundle Features)               в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

1. BILATERAL (Mutual Promises)
   в”ңв”Җ Two First Persons create together
   в”ңв”Җ Neither can forge alone
   в””в”Җ Both must sign

2. CONTEXT-SPECIFIC (Scoped Promises)
   в”ңв”Җ Proverb maps to shared context
   в”ңв”Җ Meaningless outside relationship
   в””в”Җ Cannot be reused for different relationship

3. RECOVERABLE (Promise Reconstruction)
   в”ңв”Җ If forgotten, can be rederived
   в”ңв”Җ Because based on relationship context
   в””в”Җ Not arbitrary password

4. VERIFIABLE (Assessment Evidence)
   в”ңв”Җ On-chain commitment
   в”ңв”Җ Both parties can prove participation
   в””в”Җ Can be used in recovery

5. SYBIL-RESISTANT (Commitment Cost)
   в”ңв”Җ Costs 0.01 ZEC per person (0.02 total)
   в”ңв”Җ Requires actual relationship
   в””в”Җ Can't be cheaply automated

6. NON-BIOMETRIC (Pure Promise)
   в”ңв”Җ No fingerprints, no face scans
   в”ңв”Җ No personal questions ("mother's maiden name")
   в””в”Җ Pure bilateral promise verification

PT INSIGHT: VRC is a promise bundle that enables 70:1
coordination efficiency because once mutual assessment
is verified, the bundle can be reused without re-
verification for each coordination.
```

   вҖў Acts using authorized subset
   вҖў Public coordination
   вҖў Enables network effects
   вҖў PT: Promises delegation for First Person

   вҖў Emerges from gap + time

     compromising present privacy
   вҖў Chronicles as recovery
   вҖў PT: Memory of kept promises

4. CONNECT (Network Property)
   вҖў Emerges from gap + others
   вҖў Mages coordinate efficiently
   вҖў Swordsmen maintain independence
   вҖў VRCs form trust network
   вҖў PT: Network of promise bundles

### 64-Vertex Sovereignty Lattice with Pascal's Row Strata

```
THE 64-VERTEX LATTICE (2вҒ¶ = 64 configurations)
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

Six binary dimensions: Protect, Project, Reflect, Connect, Verify, Stake

PASCAL'S ROW STRATA (wбөў = C(6,i)/64):

  Stratum 0: вҹЁ0,0,0,0,0,0вҹ©                    1 vertex    wвӮҖ = 1/64
             в”Ӯ No sovereignty active
             в–ј
  Stratum 1: вҹЁ1,0,0,0,0,0вҹ© etc                 6 vertices  wвӮҒ = 6/64
             в”Ӯ One dimension active
             в–ј
  Stratum 2: вҹЁ1,1,0,0,0,0вҹ© etc                15 vertices  wвӮӮ = 15/64
             в”Ӯ Two dimensions active
             в–ј
  Stratum 3: вҹЁ1,1,1,0,0,0вҹ© etc   в—„в”Җв”Җ PEAK    20 vertices  wвӮғ = 20/64
             в”Ӯ Three dimensions active
             в–ј
  Stratum 4: вҹЁ1,1,1,1,0,0вҹ© etc                15 vertices  wвӮ„ = 15/64
             в”Ӯ Four dimensions active
             в–ј
  Stratum 5: вҹЁ1,1,1,1,1,0вҹ© etc                 6 vertices  wвӮ… = 6/64
             в”Ӯ Five dimensions active
             в–ј
  Stratum 6: вҹЁ1,1,1,1,1,1вҹ©                     1 vertex    wвӮҶ = 1/64
             в”Ӯ FULL SOVEREIGNTY рҹҗү
             в””в”Җв”Җв”Җ "The Manifold Dragon"

  NETWORK VALUE INSIGHT:
  Twenty agents at stratum 1 produce LESS value than
  five agents at stratum 4, because higher strata activate
  more sovereignty dimensions simultaneously.

  TRIPLE CONVERGENCE ON 2вҒ¶ = 64:
  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ

### Break-Even Analysis

```
Monthly Costs: $125,000
в”ңв”Җ Development: $85,000
в”ңв”Җ Infrastructure: $25,000
в””в”Җ Operations: $15,000

Break-Even Signals: ~65,500/month
в”ңв”Җ Revenue per signal: $5.00
в”ңв”Җ Shielded pool (38.2%): $1.91/signal for operations
в”ңв”Җ Required: $125,000 / $1.91 вүҲ 65,445 signals
в””в”Җ Active First Persons: ~21,815 (at 3 signals/month)

PT INSIGHT:
Signal-based funding = assessment-based sustainability
Protocol funded by demonstrated comprehension,
not speculation or extraction
```

вҖў Each signal = assessment event Оұ(ПҖ)

вҖў Trust П„ = accumulated evidence of promise-keeping
вҖў Higher П„ вҶ’ greater capability access
вҖў Guardian eligibility requires П„ вүҘ 0.8

WHY THIS WORKS:
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Trust cannot be purchased directly     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Trust must be EARNED through:          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Sustained assessment payments        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Demonstrated comprehension           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Accumulated evidence over time       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ This creates natural Sybil resistance: в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў 500 signals = ~$2,500 + TIME         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Cannot be rushed                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Cannot be faked                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Proves genuine engagement            в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

VRC TRUST REQUIREMENTS:

                         в”Ӯ                       в”Ӯ

                         в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                    в”Ӯ
                                    в–ј
                         в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                         в”Ӯ  Minimum П„ for   в”Ӯ
                         в”Ӯ  VRC Formation:  в”Ӯ
                         в”Ӯ                  в”Ӯ
                         в”Ӯ  П„_A вүҘ 0.2 AND   в”Ӯ
                         в”Ӯ  П„_B вүҘ 0.2       в”Ӯ
                         в”Ӯ  (Light tier+)   в”Ӯ
                         в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

TRUST TRANSFER IN VRCs:

в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ VRC trust is NOT П„_A + П„_B                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VRC trust is MIN(П„_A, П„_B) with bilateral verification     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Why: Both parties must keep their promises                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      VRC is only as strong as weakest promise-keeper        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Example:                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Alice (П„ = 0.7) + Bob (П„ = 0.5) вҶ’ VRC trust вүҲ 0.5        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў High-trust Alice cannot "transfer" trust to low-trust Bob в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Both must demonstrate promise-keeping independently       в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Card 2: Promise Theory (30 seconds)

```
Promise Theory = Formal semantics for autonomous systems

Core Principles:
вҖў Autonomy axiom: Agents promise only own behavior
вҖў Superagent: FP+S+M as composite with interior promises
вҖў Irreducible promise: Gap exists in relationship, not components
вҖў Assessment Оұ(ПҖ): Signals as promise verification events
вҖў Trust function П„: 0-1 expectation of promise-keeping

Why It Matters:
вҖў Single-agent systems FORMALLY VIOLATE autonomy axiom
вҖў Dual-agent separation is mathematically necessary
вҖў Economic incentives must be promise-compatible
вҖў Trust earned through demonstrated promise-keeping

Application:
вҖў Swordsman promises protection (own behavior)
вҖў Mage promises delegation (own behavior)
вҖў Separation promise exists between them
вҖў Guardian = professional promise-keeper
```

### Card 3: Economics (30 seconds)

```
Revenue: Signal fees + chronicle rewards + VRC value
Cost: 0.01 ZEC per signal (assessment payment)
Sustainability: Non-inflationary, assessment-based, multiple streams

Trust Tiers (Trust Function П„):
вҖў Blade (0-49 signals, П„ < 0.2): Learning
вҖў Light (50-149 signals, П„ < 0.5): Basic coordination
вҖў Heavy (150-499 signals, П„ < 0.8): Intel Pools
вҖў Dragon (500+ signals, П„ вүҘ 0.8): Guardian eligible

Example costs (at $500/ZEC):
вҖў 13 sections (main spellbook) = $65 (П„ вүҲ 0.05)
вҖў 500 signals (guardian qualification) = $2,500 (П„ вүҘ 0.8)

Growth:
вҖў Year 3: Self-sustaining
вҖў Scales with network (O(nВІ) VRC relationships)
вҖў Promise-keeping creates value вҶ’ value sustains network
```

Mathematical Layer:
вҖў s вҠҘ m | X (conditional independence)
вҖў R < 1 (reconstruction ceiling)

вҖў Fano's inequality applications

Narrative Layer:
вҖў Soulbis & Soulbae (dual agents as characters)
вҖў The Gap (privacy preserved between agents)
вҖў Mirror & Map (observation vs action)
вҖў Acts & Arcs (learning through story)

Economic Layer:
вҖў SWORD & MAGE (dual tokens for protection/delegation)
вҖў Signals (0.01 ZEC, proof of learning)
вҖў Guardians (infrastructure providers)
вҖў VRCs (bilateral trust credentials)

Standards Layer (NEW):
вҖў IEEE 7012-2025 (machine-readable privacy terms)
вҖў Customer Commons (neutral agreement hosting)
вҖў SD-BASE taxonomy (agreement hierarchy)
вҖў Bilateral contracts (signed by both parties)

Promise Layer (NEW):
вҖў Autonomy axiom (agents promise only own behavior)
вҖў Superagent structure (FP+S+M as composite)
вҖў Trust function (0-1 expectation of promise-keeping)
вҖў Assessment (signals as assessment events)

### Promise Types in 0xagentprivacy

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ              PROMISE TYPE CLASSIFICATION                     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

TYPE 1: Give Promises (+)
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ "I will provide X to you"              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Examples:                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Swordsman (+) protection вҶ’ FP        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Mage (+) delegation вҶ’ FP             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Guardian (+) validation вҶ’ network    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў First Person (+) authorization вҶ’ S,M в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

TYPE 2: Accept Promises (-)
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ "I will accept/use what you provide"   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Examples:                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Swordsman (-) accepts authorization  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Mage (-) accepts authorized info     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Network (-) accepts chronicles       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў VRC partner (-) accepts verification в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

TYPE 3: Coordination Promises C(b)
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ "I will voluntarily subordinate my     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  behavior to external authority b"     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Examples:                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Spell = C(protocol_rules)            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў VRC = C(bilateral_agreement)         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Guardian = C(compression_standards)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ NOTE: Subordination is VOLUNTARY       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       Agent can always revoke          в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

TYPE 4: The Irreducible Promise
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ "A property that exists only in the    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  relationship between agents"          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ The Gap (вҠҘ) is irreducible:           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Cannot be attributed to Swordsman    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Cannot be attributed to Mage         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Exists in their maintained separationв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Requires all three (FP+S+M) to exist в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ R_max < 1 IS the irreducible promise   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Betweenness Centrality (V5.4):         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Gap has maximal C_B(v) in trust graphв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Value lives where most paths cross   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Brandes (2001): O(VВ·E) algorithm     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## IEEE 7012-2025 Protocol Flow

### The Inversion: Individual-First Agreements

```
TRADITIONAL MODEL (Attack Pattern)

### Key Properties (Promise-Theoretic Framing)

```
PROPERTY 1: Conditional Independence (Separation Promise)
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ s вҠҘ m | X                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Promise Theory: Non-overlapping scopes в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Swordsman observes protection scope    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Mage observes delegation scope         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Neither promises the other's behavior  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ The separation is a KEPT PROMISE       в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

PROPERTY 2: Additive Bounds (Scope Limits)
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ I(X; s,m) вүӨ I(X;s) + I(X;m)           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Promise Theory: Valency constraints    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Each agent has limited promise capacityв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Joint capacity is SUM not PRODUCT      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Architectural enforcement of limits    в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

PROPERTY 3: Reconstruction Ceiling (Irreducible Promise)
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ R(X|s,m) < 1                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Promise Theory: Irreducible property   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Exists only in relationship between    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Swordsman, Mage, and First Person     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Cannot be captured by compromising one в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ The Gap IS the irreducible promise     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

WHY SUPERAGENT MATTERS:

1. ADVERSARY SEES EXTERIOR ONLY
   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
   в”Ӯ Adversary observes superagent       в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ Cannot see interior promises        в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ Cannot distinguish S from M         в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ Cannot observe Gap directly         в”Ӯ
   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

2. COMPROMISE REQUIRES ALL THREE
   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
   в”Ӯ Compromise S alone вҶ’ Learn C_S bits в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ Compromise M alone вҶ’ Learn C_M bits в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ Compromise FP alone вҶ’ No agent keys в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ                                     в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ Full reconstruction requires ALL:   в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ FP + S + M cooperating              в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ                                     в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ The Gap exists in their cooperation в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ No single compromise captures it    в”Ӯ
   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

3. IRREDUCIBLE PROMISE LOCATION
   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
   в”Ӯ R_max < 1 is not in S               в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ R_max < 1 is not in M               в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ R_max < 1 is not in FP              в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ                                     в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ R_max < 1 is IN THE RELATIONSHIP    в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ It exists BETWEEN the components    в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ It requires maintained separation   в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ                                     в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ This is the "shimmer of dignity"    в”Ӯ
   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

### Layer Descriptions (Promise-Theoretic)

**Sovereign Agent (Top Layers):**
- **UI & Human Experience**: User-facing interfaces for making and accepting promises
- **Trust Tasks**: Core functionality for promise exchange, coordination, and verification

**Trust Spanning Protocol (TSP):**
- Connects agent layer (promise-making) with wallet layer (commitment storage)
- Implements coordination promises C(b) across the stack

**Sovereign Wallet (Bottom Layers):**
- **Verifiable Credentials & Digital Assets**: Storage for promise bundles and commitment stakes
- **Self-Certifying Identifiers (SCIDs)**: Foundation for autonomy axiom compliance
- **Cryptographic Keys**: Enforcement layer for promise-keeping (ZK proofs transform "trust me" to "verify me")

в”Ӯ вҖў Verifiable by each other                      в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ                                                  в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ 1. Alice claims: "I'm Alice, I lost my keys"    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 2. Bob asks: "What's our proverb?"              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 3. Alice forms correct proverb from context     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 4. Bob verifies: "Yes, that's Alice"            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 5. Recovery proceeds (with multiple VRCs)       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                  в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ     keeping (expanding the cipher correctly)     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                  в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ Just bilateral promise verification.            в”Ӯ

### VRC Properties (Promise Bundle Characteristics)

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ                 VRC PROPERTIES                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ              (Promise Bundle Features)               в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

1. BILATERAL (Mutual Promises)
   в”ңв”Җ Two First Persons create together
   в”ңв”Җ Neither can forge alone
   в””в”Җ Both must sign

2. CONTEXT-SPECIFIC (Scoped Promises)
   в”ңв”Җ Proverb maps to shared context
   в”ңв”Җ Meaningless outside relationship
   в””в”Җ Cannot be reused for different relationship

3. RECOVERABLE (Promise Reconstruction)
   в”ңв”Җ If forgotten, can be rederived
   в”ңв”Җ Because based on relationship context
   в””в”Җ Not arbitrary password

4. VERIFIABLE (Assessment Evidence)
   в”ңв”Җ On-chain commitment
   в”ңв”Җ Both parties can prove participation
   в””в”Җ Can be used in recovery

5. SYBIL-RESISTANT (Commitment Cost)
   в”ңв”Җ Costs 0.01 ZEC per person (0.02 total)
   в”ңв”Җ Requires actual relationship
   в””в”Җ Can't be cheaply automated

6. NON-BIOMETRIC (Pure Promise)
   в”ңв”Җ No fingerprints, no face scans
   в”ңв”Җ No personal questions ("mother's maiden name")
   в””в”Җ Pure bilateral promise verification

PT INSIGHT: VRC is a promise bundle that enables 70:1
coordination efficiency because once mutual assessment
is verified, the bundle can be reused without re-
verification for each coordination.
```

PT INSIGHT:
The gap (вҠҘ) is not emptinessвҖ”it's an irreducible promise.
This promise, when combined with time, creates REFLECT.
This promise, when combined with others, creates CONNECT.

The tetrahedral structure has O(16) interior promises
between its four components. This complexity is justified
only because the emergent value (sovereignty preserved
through maintained separation) exceeds the coordination
cost of the additional promises.

### Break-Even Analysis

```
Monthly Costs: $125,000
в”ңв”Җ Development: $85,000
в”ңв”Җ Infrastructure: $25,000
в””в”Җ Operations: $15,000

Break-Even Signals: ~65,500/month
в”ңв”Җ Revenue per signal: $5.00
в”ңв”Җ Shielded pool (38.2%): $1.91/signal for operations
в”ңв”Җ Required: $125,000 / $1.91 вүҲ 65,445 signals
в””в”Җ Active First Persons: ~21,815 (at 3 signals/month)

PT INSIGHT:
Signal-based funding = assessment-based sustainability
Protocol funded by demonstrated comprehension,
not speculation or extraction
```

### Trust in VRC Formation

```
VRC TRUST REQUIREMENTS:

                    Alice (П„_A)              Bob (П„_B)
                         в”Ӯ                       в”Ӯ
                         в”Ӯ    VRC Formation      в”Ӯ
                         в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                    в”Ӯ
                                    в–ј
                         в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                         в”Ӯ  Minimum П„ for   в”Ӯ
                         в”Ӯ  VRC Formation:  в”Ӯ
                         в”Ӯ                  в”Ӯ
                         в”Ӯ  П„_A вүҘ 0.2 AND   в”Ӯ
                         в”Ӯ  П„_B вүҘ 0.2       в”Ӯ
                         в”Ӯ  (Light tier+)   в”Ӯ
                         в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

TRUST TRANSFER IN VRCs:

в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ VRC trust is NOT П„_A + П„_B                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VRC trust is MIN(П„_A, П„_B) with bilateral verification     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Why: Both parties must keep their promises                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      VRC is only as strong as weakest promise-keeper        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Example:                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Alice (П„ = 0.7) + Bob (П„ = 0.5) вҶ’ VRC trust вүҲ 0.5        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў High-trust Alice cannot "transfer" trust to low-trust Bob в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Both must demonstrate promise-keeping independently       в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Card 2: Promise Theory (30 seconds)

```
Promise Theory = Formal semantics for autonomous systems

Core Principles:
вҖў Autonomy axiom: Agents promise only own behavior
вҖў Superagent: FP+S+M as composite with interior promises
вҖў Irreducible promise: Gap exists in relationship, not components
вҖў Assessment Оұ(ПҖ): Signals as promise verification events
вҖў Trust function П„: 0-1 expectation of promise-keeping

Why It Matters:
вҖў Single-agent systems FORMALLY VIOLATE autonomy axiom
вҖў Dual-agent separation is mathematically necessary
вҖў Economic incentives must be promise-compatible
вҖў Trust earned through demonstrated promise-keeping

Application:
вҖў Swordsman promises protection (own behavior)
вҖў Mage promises delegation (own behavior)
вҖў Separation promise exists between them
вҖў Guardian = professional promise-keeper
```

### Card 3: Economics (30 seconds)

```
Revenue: Signal fees + chronicle rewards + VRC value
Cost: 0.01 ZEC per signal (assessment payment)
Sustainability: Non-inflationary, assessment-based, multiple streams

Trust Tiers (Trust Function П„):
вҖў Blade (0-49 signals, П„ < 0.2): Learning
вҖў Light (50-149 signals, П„ < 0.5): Basic coordination
вҖў Heavy (150-499 signals, П„ < 0.8): Intel Pools
вҖў Dragon (500+ signals, П„ вүҘ 0.8): Guardian eligible

Example costs (at $500/ZEC):
вҖў 13 sections (main spellbook) = $65 (П„ вүҲ 0.05)
вҖў 500 signals (guardian qualification) = $2,500 (П„ вүҘ 0.8)

Growth:
вҖў Year 3: Self-sustaining
вҖў Scales with network (O(nВІ) VRC relationships)
вҖў Promise-keeping creates value вҶ’ value sustains network
```
